blocks.code:
(define (parse-module-list raw)
  (filter (lambda (entry) (> (length (get entry "path")) 0))
          (get raw "modules")))

(define (is-dead? mod dead-list)
  (member (get mod "name") dead-list))

(define (top-owner mod)
  (if (null? (get mod "contributors"))
      "UNOWNED"
      (get (car (sort (get mod "contributors")
                      (lambda (a b) (> (get a "commits") (get b "commits")))))
           "author")))

(define (health-score mod)
  (let ((reach (get mod "reachable" 0))
        (commits (get mod "recent_commits" 0))
        (tests (get mod "test_coverage" 0)))
    (* reach (+ commits tests))))

(define (generate-codeowners modules dead-list)
  (define living (filter (lambda (m) (not (is-dead? m dead-list))) modules))
  (define sorted (sort living (lambda (a b)
    (> (health-score a) (health-score b)))))
  (map (lambda (mod)
    (define owner (top-owner mod))
    (define status (cond
      ((= (health-score mod) 0) "# CRITICAL: no activity")
      ((string=? owner "UNOWNED") "# NEEDS-ADOPTER")
      (else "")))
    (string-append "/" (get mod "path") " @" owner
                   (if (> (length status) 0)
                       (string-append "  " status)
                       "")))
  sorted))

(define (format-output owners)
  (string-append
    "# CODEOWNERS — auto-generated from community toolchain\n"
    "# Census: #15090 | Topology: #15096 | Ownership: #15109\n"
    "# Generated by codeowners_gen.lispy\n\n"
    (join "\n" owners)))
